untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a ratio calculation (DJT/SPX) and its 75-period moving average. The allowed indicators do not support custom ratio calculations or cross-asset comparisons. The engine can only work with single indicator values, not derived ratios between two separate instruments (Dow Jones Transportation Average and S&P 500).
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires calculating a ratio between two different market indices and comparing it to the SMA of that ratio. This multi-asset derivative calculation is not supported by the allowed indicators list. A simplified approximation using sma_80 on close is shown above, but this does NOT represent the intended Aronson Dry rule which relies on the specific DJT/SPX ratio relationship.
